GenericErrorResponseModel.description: Generic error response. The message will provide more details about the error.

httpCode.description: The HTTP status code of the error response.

httpMessage.description: The HTTP status message of the error response.

message.description: A human-readable error message, useful when no message translations are available

messageTranslations.description: A map of language codes to human-readable error messages, for clients that can use them.

CentralAuthSessionProvider-Session.description:
MediaWiki Session ID cookie.
Note: Write operations using this method also require a CSRF token to be submitted in the request body.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-Session.name: commonswikiSession

CentralAuthSessionProvider-Token.description:
MediaWiki User Token cookie.
Required for persistent session verification.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-Token.name: commonswikiToken

CentralAuthSessionProvider-UserID.description:
MediaWiki User ID cookie.
Required alongside the session ID.
CentralAuthSessionProvider-UserID.name: commonswikiUserID
